title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Jordan Topoleski (Cursor COO) moderates engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discussing how their organizations adopted AI coding tools at scale. The panel covers workflow changes, productivity measurement, and lessons learned including that engineers spend significant time on non-coding tasks and that AI is inverting the traditional software development lifecycle bell curve.
